SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF UNCHA STANKOWICZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAYMOND CASTRO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTRO, RAYMOND
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANKOWICZ, UNCHA DBA   GOOD EARTH PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, RAYMOND
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTRO, RAYMOND

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANKOWICZ, UNCHA DBA   GOOD EARTH PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, RAYMOND $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00- SERVED NOV-20-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, RAYMOND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-25-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
